$Comment: CASUAL preset (partial overlay, decoded via MobScalingSettingsAsset.CODEC). Only the keys that differ from Default; every omitted leaf (and every un-listed leaf inside a partially-filled nested group) falls through to the jar Default via the per-leaf fold. Selected by setting ActivePreset:"Casual" (owner file or /mobscaling preset Casual). A gentler curve: softer intensity, rarer specials, a narrower group swing, a far-out capped distance escalation, and a gentler StatCurve (slower HP/damage growth, softer caps).
Name: Casual
